name: mckellardw slide_snake finish
description: Auto-generated finish workflow for source repository mckellardw__slide_snake, split into source Snakemake rules as sequential checkpoints.

steps.name: ilmn 1c fastq call bc from adapter
ilmn 2a bwa rRNA get no rRNA list
ilmn 2a bwa rRNA filter trimmed R1
ilmn 2b ribodetector get no rRNA list
ilmn 2c qualimap readqc summary2csv rRNA bwa
ilmn 2c qualimap bamqc summary2csv rRNA bwa
ilmn 5a copy R2 fq for mirge
ont 1a subset fastq by adapter type
ont 1a split fastq to R1 R2
ont 1c fastq call bc from adapter
ont 2b txome filter bam empty tags
ont 2d ultra filter bam empty tags
ont 2d ultra add featureCounts to bam
ont 2e add isoquant genes to bam
ont 2e add isoquant transcripts to bam
